global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with engaging gameplay elements and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Promoting the game 'NeonArena' with a focus on unlocking rare gear and a no-ads offer.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth gradient background transitioning from light to dark purple.

elements.label: NeonArena logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized text logo reading 'NeonArena' in a large, eye-catching font at the top.

elements.label: Gameplay screenshot
elements.description: A screenshot showing a grid of game elements, possibly representing gameplay mechanics.

elements.label: Gameplay screenshot
elements.description: Another screenshot displaying interactive game elements, enhancing the gameplay experience.

elements.description: A small icon representing a game feature, located at the top left.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A small icon indicating a game feature, located at the top right.

elements.label: Unlock rare gear text
elements.description: Text stating 'Unlock rare gear' in a clear, readable font, positioned centrally.

elements.label: No ads text
elements.description: Text reading 'No ads in first week' in a smaller font, placed below the main message.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Shop now' in a prominent position at the bottom.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unclear element that does not have a specific identifiable role.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large, bold headline at the top of the ad, capturing attention immediately.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Text providing additional information about the game, centrally positioned.
elements.text_content: Unlock rare gear No ads in first week

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button at the bottom, inviting users to engage.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, playable, bright and playful, NeonArena, unlock rare gear, no ads in first week.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by gameplay screenshots in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NeonArena, Unlock rare gear, No ads in first week, Shop now
